review_round: 2026-06-30 orchestrator review fix (round 1: gaps 1-3; round 2: recurring-grouping + fail-closed)

review_round_2.1_recurring_gap_grouping: audit_verification_feedback now GROUPS by a deterministic gap class (_gap_class: explicit gap_type if present, else normalized cap_id|source|detail). A class shared by >=2 distinct gap_ids emits a 'recurring verification-gap class' finding (highest severity in the class) with a calibrate proposed_action — recurrence is the signal to tighten the GATE, not just the one instance. Tests: test_recurring_class_by_gap_type, test_recurring_by_derived_key_when_no_gap_type, test_single_occurrence_not_recurring.
review_round_2.2_fail_closed_corrupt_sink: pretooluse-verify-finish-gate.py no longer fails OPEN on a bad feedback sink. main() now distinguishes ABSENT (ok, no feedback) from PRESENT-BUT-CORRUPT: a present sink that fails to parse sets feedback_unreadable=True and decide() DENIES 收尾 (a malformed feedback file can no longer bypass the gap gate). Test: test_finish_blocked_when_feedback_sink_unreadable.
review_round_2.tests: py -3 -m pytest ~/.claude/lib/tests/ ~/.claude/hooks/house_cleaning/tests/ -q -> 505 passed, 0 failed (incl. the +5 round-2 tests; the earlier out_of_scope reds are gone — suite fully green).

bugfix_round_3.pin_dangling_current_junction: scripts/pin-local-fork-install.ps1 Set-CurrentPointer crashed when the Codex `current` junction was DANGLING (target quarantined/removed): Resolve-Path on the missing junction target threw under ErrorActionPreference=Stop before the existing delete+rebuild path ran. Root cause: the pointer resolver assumed the symlink/junction target exists. Fix: resolve $item.Target with -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue (scoped to that resolve only) -> a dangling junction resolves to '' -> no match -> falls through to delete + rebuild `current` -> new versioned cache. A non-link `current` still throws at the explicit guard, so other real failures are NOT masked.
bugfix_round_3.tests: tests/test-pin-dangling-current.ps1 (NEW, RED->GREEN: reproduced the exact line-84 crash, now PASS — pin fails soft + rebuilds current -> 6.0.3-vmodel.12). tests/test-local-fork-install.ps1 still PASS (normal path unaffected).

gaps_fixed.1_missing_ack: ack committed in this round (the prior round wrote it on disk AFTER commit b3503fc, so it was absent from that commit). It is in the plugin repo at .superpowers/orch/outbox/2026-06-30-superpower-maturity-feedback-loop.ack.json and committed.
gaps_fixed.2_house_cleaning_actually_wired: NOT a future seam anymore. Added ~/.claude/hooks/house_cleaning/audit_verification_feedback.py (run(ctx)->findings, reads the global verification-feedback sink, surfaces unresolved P0-P3) and REGISTERED it in ~/.claude/hooks/house_cleaning/report.py:run_and_collect (the 'Verification Gap Feedback' section) so the EXISTING weekly routine runs it — no new scheduler. Read-only audit; calibration auto-apply remains gated by autoapply_safety. Test: ~/.claude/hooks/house_cleaning/tests/test_audit_verification_feedback.py (3 tests incl. a registration guard).
gaps_fixed.3_signoff_consumer: Real gate consumer, not a standalone helper. ~/.claude/hooks/pretooluse-verify-finish-gate.py:decide() now takes feedback_events, loads <repo>/.superpowers/verify/feedback-events.jsonl in main(), and DENIES 收尾 when verification_feedback.blocks_signoff() is non-empty (unresolved P0-P3 -> blocked is not done). Tests: ~/.claude/lib/tests/test_verify_finish_gate.py::test_finish_blocked_by_unresolved_feedback_gap and ::test_finish_allowed_when_feedback_resolved. The plugin doc (docs/orch) now documents the wired consumer; verify-spec/finish wording references it via the doc.
